title: psychotria sauvallei
intro: Psychotria sauvallei, also known as Sauvalle's wild coffee or simply Psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been observed to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Psychotria sauvallei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of Psychotria sauvallei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent to create a medicinal extract.
